heading: Lower Snug vs Lower Turners Marsh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Snug, Tasmania and Lower Turners Marsh, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Turners Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Lower Snug (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Snug or Lower Turners Marsh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Snug has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Lower Turners Marsh scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Snug scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Turners Marsh scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Snug or Lower Turners Marsh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Turners Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
